title: Kenyan Mushroom Toast
description: A flavorful and savory dish combining the rich flavors of Kenya with the earthiness of mushrooms. This toast is perfect as a snack or light meal.
instructions: Slice the bread into 1-inch thick slices and toast until lightly browned.
In a pan, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start browning.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
To assemble the toast, spread a layer of butter on each slice, followed by a spoonful of the mushroom mixture.
Place the toast under the broiler for 1-2 minutes to melt the butter and warm the bread.
